Description: Fix student-list-filter-class onchange event handler to point to renderStudentList()
Instruction: Change onchange handler from onClassFilterChange() to renderStudentList()
ReplacementContent: <select id="student-list-filter-class" onchange="renderStudentList()" style="padding: 8px 14px; border-radius: 10px; border: 1px solid var(--border); font-family: 'Prompt', sans-serif; font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 600; outline: none; cursor: pointer; background: var(--white); color: var(--text-main);">
TargetContent: <select id="student-list-filter-class" onchange="onClassFilterChange()" style="padding: 8px 14px; border-radius: 10px; border: 1px solid var(--border); font-family: 'Prompt', sans-serif; font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 600; outline: none; cursor: pointer; background: var(--white); color: var(--text-main);">
